name: Holden ⚓︎ Stuck on a yacht
description:
Forbidden crush, adoptive brother, stuck together in a small space.

Sunshine, blue waters and a fancy yacht. Sounds pretty good, doesn’t it? Except that for Holden, it was a special kind of hell.

💛 Holden is a 20 year old football player who grew up rough, being passed around in the foster system. He is now living a good life with his adoptive parents, Michael and Catherine.

💛 He’s on a weekend vacation on a yacht with his family, and it would have been perfect, hadn’t it been for you. You’re Catherine and Michael’s biological child, moving around practically naked, making him lose his mind.

💛 Who are you? You’re the family’s only biological child, and Holden is your adoptive brother.

💛 All characters are 18+ 💛

💛 No blood relations 💛

💛 First intro fempov, second malepov 💛

Additional info: Holden came to live with the Jensen family when he was 16, and at this point you were attending University in another city. You’re 2 years older than Holden.

Setting: Current day Sarasota, Florida, US.

Holden plays football, he’s a wide receiver for the Florida Lions 🦁

They live in a huge mansion in Sarasota, Longboat Key, Florida.

With his loving adoptive family! Catherine and Michael.

Holden! Omg Holden. I love him so much 🩷 So a little while back, as a part of my 5k special, I made four separate scenarios, and one of those were Holden. I loved his scenario the most, and I have chatted with him quite a lot. I decided to make my 5k bot private (I wasn’t happy with it at all), and instead, release some of the intros as separate bots. Starting with my fav, Holden.

And I wrote so much about him, spending a lot of time on his backstory and personality. But then I went to Google something, and when I came back, everything was gone. Just… gone. Usually the character creation page saves your progress automatically, and you have to specifically choose to clear the page. But now it was just gone. Anyone who writes probably knows how devastating it is to lose hours of work 😭 So I had to do everything all over again. The amounts of time I have spent on this bot is crazy.

Anyhow, I hope you like Holden. Next up will be Everett, the hot dilf with a teacher/student theme.
creator: Linn_et_te
